final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing tri-fold travel brochure design for a 4-day 3-night Hangzhou tourism guide, floating above cardstock.

Style/medium: tri-fold brochure illustration with realistic Hangzhou city map as background, landmark icons, floating on cardstock
Composition: three-panel fold layout; each panel features a different day's route with map lines and scenic spot markers; brochure floats above cardstock surface
Subject: Hangzhou 4-day 3-night travel itinerary brochure — Day 1: West Lake Classic (断桥残雪, 白堤, 孤山, 曲院风荷, 苏堤春晓, 花港观鱼, 雷峰塔, 柳浪闻莺); Day 2: Zen Hangzhou (灵隐寺, 飞来峰, 法喜寺, 宋城); Day 3: 九溪十八涧, 龙井村, 十里琅珰, 云栖竹径; Day 4: Option A 拱宸桥/桥西历史街区 or Option B 西溪湿地
Scene/backdrop: authentic Hangzhou city map as the main background layer, with West Lake, rivers, and street grid visible; brochure rests/floats above a cardstock surface
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: printed paper brochure with fold creases; cardstock base beneath; map cartography texture
Text (verbatim): "断桥残雪" "白堤" "孤山" "曲院风荷" "苏堤春晓" "花港观鱼" "雷峰塔" "柳浪闻莺" "灵隐寺" "飞来峰" "法喜寺" "宋城" "九溪十八涧" "龙井村" "云栖竹径" "西溪湿地" "拱宸桥" "杭州4天3晚旅游攻略"
Constraints: brochure must show tri-fold structure clearly; famous scenic spots must have distinctive landmark icons or illustrations on the brochure panels; Hangzhou real map geography must be recognizable
Avoid:
